subcodes.title: Words to Mrs C., spoken on 1920-10-23
subcodes.first_line: There is no great hurry. We have lived here many years without electric lights... I know the hearts and the thoughts of all the believers. The wise physician knows the condition of all his patients... It does not mean that he lived 900 years as we count them... These questions are not very important.
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @light and darkness, @laws of marriage and dowry
